name: Filet Mignon
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter and olive oil in a heavy skillet over medium-high heat.
2. When the pan is hot, add the filets.
3. Cook for 4–5 minutes on one side, then turn and cook for another 4–5 minutes or until the desired degree of doneness is reached. An instant-read thermometer can be used if an exact internal temperature is desired.
4. Transfer to a warmed platter and serve with caramelized onions, horseradish sauce, or flavored butter.
5. Broiling instructions: Preheat the broiler and place the filets 3 inches from the heat. Broil for 4–5 minutes; turn and broil another 4–5 minutes or until the desired degree of doneness is reached.
